name: rk-word-editor-monorepo
description: A modern, customizable, open-source rich-text Word editor built with Tiptap and ProseMirror

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-core && npm run build --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-ui && npm run build --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-cli && npm run build --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-demo
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-core && npm run build --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-ui
scripts.clean: rimraf packages/*/dist apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules node_modules
scripts.publish:packages: npm publish --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-core --access public && npm publish --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-ui --access public && npm publish --workspace=@raazkhnl/rk-editor-cli --access public
